description: Create a warehouse floor plan for the 'NorthEast Distribution Center' in EdrawMax. The diagram must include a large rectangular building shell with three loading docks on the top wall labeled 'Dock 1', 'Dock 2', and 'Dock 3'. In the center, create a storage area with four parallel rows of pallet racks labeled 'Row A', 'Row B', 'Row C', and 'Row D'. In the bottom-right corner, include a packing area labeled 'Packing Station' containing a conveyor belt or packing tables. Place at least two forklift vehicles in the aisles. Add text labels for three operational zones: 'Zone 1: Receiving' near the docks, 'Zone 2: Bulk Storage' at the center racks, and 'Zone 3: Outbound' in the bottom-right. Include the title 'NorthEast Distribution Center' at the top of the diagram. Save the native file to /home/ga/Diagrams/warehouse_layout.eddx and export an image to /home/ga/Diagrams/warehouse_layout.png.
